creator: bakhur@inbox.ru
text: Also I would note that adding command_args="-c /usr/local/etc/motion.conf" to the rc.d startup script won't prevent to fail OS boot if you won't comment "videodevice /dev/bktr0" in the motion.conf in situation when you have no real connected hardware camera device. I think it would be nice to comment this string in the motion.conf by default and let to choose camera device to user after motion installation.
